since_last: 55% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.94%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.26% · BTC +0.46% · Gold +1.61% · Nasdaq100 +1.10%. 55% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.94%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.94%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.00%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: LRCX is the standout at +10.71%
cards.body: Leaders: LRCX +10.71%, AMAT +9.79%, KLAC +9.41%, TER +8.94%, ARM +8.79%. Laggards: AVAV -4.96%, SOUN -4.85%, CRM -4.07%, PLTR -4.02%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.22% at $150.11
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.22% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
